title: cleisostoma aspersum
intro: Cleisostoma aspersum, also known as the Dusty Orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma aspersum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Cleisostoma aspersum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a powder or tincture for various herbal remedies.
